descripcion: Extensions and application notes of the global taxonomy for Chile. Does not replace temas.json, it complements it.

notas_de_aplicacion.nota: The supervisory authority in Chile is the Personal Data Protection Agency (APDP), created by Law 21.096. Its implementation is underway. Prior to its creation, pronouncements in their respective areas came from the Civil Registry and Identification Service and the Council for Transparency.
Chilean legislation uses the term 'datos sensibles' analogously to Ecuador. Law 21.096 expanded the catalog of sensitive data compared to the previous law (Law 19.628).

Law 21.096 introduced a legal bases model closer to the GDPR than the previous system under Law 19.628, which was based primarily on consent. When tagging norms from Law 19.628 and its amendments, consider the historical context.
